title: Static fields should be read-only
messageFormat: Mark this static field as 'readonly' or expose its value through a property instead.
summary: A static field that is neither readonly nor const is shared, writable state for the whole process. Any code in any thread can reassign it, so its value at a given moment is hard to reason about and races are easy to introduce.

Marking the field readonly pins the reference after construction and documents that the slot is set once. When the value genuinely needs to change, hide it behind a property with controlled access so the mutation point is explicit.
